pairs.aEvidence: Backspin is an outcome. Build the delivered-face-to-travel gap, then see how Ball Speed scales it.
pairs.bEvidence: Backspin is the ball's backward rotation that creates lift and helps a shot hold its flight.
pairs.reason: A teaches the controllable causal chain, scopes the model, and gives the mission a clearer learning purpose.
criticalDefects: B omits visible model assumptions and can be read as a complete real-world account.

overall.verdict: The same causal, evidence-rich, model-scoped generation wins all eight balanced comparisons. This is a pairwise visual verdict only.
